text.message: i have brick, which means you have brick
first of all, you have 11 brick i dont
second, the only brick i got was my first one and i spent it
oh you right, i missed the 11, my bad
i got brick if you want it
gues he wanted more brick lol
made the mistake of not soloing 9
i guess we giving the game to blue then lol
idk why you wouldnt take the nb
to not block them is to throw
so i need to look out for myself
if i was doing well, id be playing to not lose
and you'll stay on 3 with plays like that
since im doing poorly, i need to play to win
you on the other hand are doing okay
which makes it even more surprising
two cycles later, blue isnt even winning
do you see how throwing a tantrum over your own poor decision is a little sly?
im prepared to accept your apology when youre ready black
but i have to burn a lot for it
lol you want him to have army and road, can you kingmake any harder lmao
just keeping game from ending black
wouldnt expect you to recognize it
ill accept your appology when blue wins
given that you win with road
whatever helps you sleep at night mate
like i said, i cant expect you to get it
soloing me all game is kingmaking lol
8 ore made sense to me, if you gonna trade all your ore to blue, 8 ore is a block on blue
i suppose there is actually some logic to that
obviously ill stop trading blue when he gets too close
